steps.label: cause
steps.text: Decomposed plant and animal material is returned to vineyard soil as compost.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Organic matter supports soil organisms, improves aggregation and water-holding behaviour, and releases nutrients gradually as it decomposes.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Composting can recycle vineyard waste and support soil health while reducing reliance on rapidly available synthetic inputs.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: compost recycles organic material and can improve soil structure and biological activity.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
